product.name: PROMETHEUS
product.line: Built with Codex. Evolved through PROMETHEUS. Proven on EDEN.

mission.title: Publish a replay-safe proof receipt
mission.objective: Prove that consequential operations fail closed, are repaired behaviorally, and preserve the successful strategy for verified reuse.
acceptance: Reproduce a real bounded replay failure

pipeline.detail: Mission admitted to the governed build loop.
Idempotent replay guard changed runtime behavior.
Tests, artifacts, receipt and hashes verified.
Related task reused the Genome with measured improvement.

systems.name: PROMETHEUS
systems.summary: Turns missions into governed, evidence-backed engineering outcomes.

systems.name: EDEN
systems.summary: Executes approved work through the competition runtime body.

systems.name: HYDRA
systems.summary: Repairs demonstrated defects and proves that behavior changed.

systems.name: ProofGrid
systems.summary: Hashes artifacts, verifies receipts and authorizes evidence-backed claims.

systems.name: SECA
systems.summary: Blocks unsupported success and holds promotion until proof exists.

systems.name: THOTH
systems.summary: Preserves lineage, receipts, decisions and reusable engineering memory.

systems.name: ServerForge
systems.summary: Converts build events into a reviewable competition narrative.

systems.name: Packet OS
systems.summary: Translates governed intent into bounded work packets and execution state.

systems.name: Build Truth
systems.summary: The operational authority for claims, completion, evidence and release state.

systems.name: Capability Genome
systems.summary: Encodes verified repair knowledge with applicability and exclusions.

seca.reason: Duplicate consequential operation was not replay-safe.
seca.resolution: Promotion reopened only after HYDRA repair and ProofGrid verification.

genome.title: Replay-safe consequential operation
genome.trigger: Stable operation ID is invoked more than once.
exclusions: conflicting payload under the same operation ID

documentation.name: Quickstart
documentation.description: Run, verify and inspect the competition package.

documentation.name: Judge brief
documentation.description: The competition thesis, proof chain and scoring surface.

documentation.name: ProofGrid receipt
documentation.description: Machine-readable promotion receipt and artifact hashes.

documentation.name: Capability Genome
documentation.description: Reusable repair knowledge with scope and exclusions.
